brand: Baebele mo go Phuthololweng go le Gangwe
docTitle: Baebele ka Mmapa · Baebele mo go Phuthololweng go le Gangwe
metaDesc: Sala morago tatelano ya nako ya Testamente e Kgologolo, botshelo jwa ga Jesu, le maeto a ga Paulo mo mmapeng wa nnete — Baebele e diragetse mo mafelong a mmatota.

s.kicker: Baebele mo go Phuthololweng go le Gangwe · Mmapa
s.title: Baebele ka Mmapa
s.verse: “Gonne e rile re lo itsise thata ya Morena wa rona Jesu Keresete le go tla gape ga gagwe, ra bo re sa latele dinaane tse di rulagantsweng ka botlhale, mme re ne re le basupi ba ba bonyeng borena jwa gagwe.” (2 Petoro 1:16)
s.purpose: Baebele ga se tlhamane. Ke pego ya batho ba ba neng ba tsamaya mo mafelong, malatsing le maineng a mmatota. Sala morago ditsela tseo mo mmapeng, ka tatelano ya nako — tobetsa ntlha, kgotsa o gatelele ▶ go tsamaya ka yona kgato ka kgato.
s.ot_kick: ① Testamente e Kgologolo — go ralala nako
s.ot_h: Go tswa tlholong go ya poelong kwa Jerusalema
s.ot_lead: E seng loeto lo le longwe mme go elela ga histori ya kgololo go tloga tlholong go ya pele: tlholo le go wa → morwalela le Babele → pitso (Aborahame) → lefatshe le le solofeditsweng → Ekesodo → sekaka → phenyo → bogosi → kgaogano → botshwarwa → poelo.
s.je_kick: ② Testamente e Ntšhwa — botshelo jwa ga Jesu
s.je_h: Go tswa Bethelehema go ya Jerusalema
s.je_lead: Sala morago botshelo jwa ga Jesu jaaka Diefangele di bo bolela, ka tatelano — go tswa go tsalwa ga gagwe kwa Bethelehema, ka kolobetso ya gagwe le tirelo kwa Galilea, go ralala Samaria, go ya sefapaanong, tsogo le go tlhatlogela legodimong kwa Jerusalema.
s.pa_kick: ③ Testamente e Ntšhwa — maeto a ga Paulo
s.pa_h: Go tswa Antiokia go ya dikhutlong tsa lefatshe — Roma
s.pa_lead: Go tswa Pentekoste kwa Jerusalema, ka fa Efangele e neng ya anama ka teng kwa ntle ga Jutea — go ralala Asia e Nnye le Yuropa go ya pelong ya mmuso. Tlhopha lengwe la maeto a matlhano (la 1·la 2·la 3 + loeto lwa go ya Roma + morago ga go gololwa) mme o sale morago ditiragalo tsa Ditiro le dikwalo tse di kwadilweng mo tseleng.
s.foot: Metswedi · Mafelo a latela mokwalo wa Baebele le jokerafi e e tlwaelegileng ya Baebele (ka maina a sešwa fa go thusa). Matshele a lewatle, dinoka le madiba di gatisitswe go tswa mo datheng e e bulegileng ya jokerafi (Natural Earth), tse di nolofaditsweng.
s.contact: Dipotso · dikakgelo — Re romelele imeile

eden.name: Edene (Tlholo · Go Wa)
eden.note: Mo lefatsheng le le neng le dirilwe le le “molemo thata,” boleo bo a tsena bo kgaola kgolagano fa gare ga Modimo le batho.
events: Tlholo mo malatsing a marataro — “go ne go le molemo thata”
Motho o dirilwe ka setshwano sa Modimo
Go wa, le go lelekwa mo Edeneng
Tsholofetso ya ntlha ya Efangele — “losika lwa mosadi lo tla tšhwetla tlhogo ya noga”

noah.name: Ararate (Morwalela)
noah.today: Thaba ya Ararate, botlhaba jwa Turkey gompieno
noah.note: Modimo o atlhola lefatshe le le tletseng boleo, le fa go ntse jalo o boloka botshelo ka lelapa le le lengwe.
events: Lefatshe le le tletseng tshenyego
Morwalela, le araka ya ga Noa
Kgolagano ya motshe wa godimo — “ga nkitla ke tlhola ke senya lefatshe ka morwalela”

babel.name: Tora ya Babele
babel.note: Kgatlhanong le boikgodiso jo bo batlang go fitlha legodimong, Modimo o tlhakatlhakanya puo ya bone mme a phatlalatsa merafe mo lefatsheng.
events: “A re ageng motse le tora… mme re itireleng leina”
Modimo o tlhakatlhakanya puo ya bone
Merafe e a phatlalala mo lefatsheng (Shinare — moragonyana Babele)

ur.name: Ur
ur.note: Kgang ya Baebele ya kgololo e simolola ka pitso ya monna a le mongwe.
events: Modimo o bitsa Aborame go tswa Ur wa Bakaladia
“Ke tla go dira setšhaba se segolo… ditshika tsotlhe di tshegofadiwe ka wena”
Ka tumelo o tswa mo lefatsheng la gabo

haran.name: Harane
haran.note: Mo tseleng, a araba pitso go ya lefatsheng le le solofeditsweng.
events: Lelapa la ga Tera le aga kwa Harane
Tera o a swa
Aborame o tswela kwa Kanana a le dingwaga di le 75

shechem.name: Sikeme · Kanana
shechem.note: Mo lefatsheng le le solofeditsweng go thaiwa lelapa mme kgolagano e fetela kwa ditshikeng.
events: Go tsena Kanana, sebeso sa ntlha — “ke tla naya losika lwa gago lefatshe le”
Kgolagano (Genesise 15) · Isake · Jakobe
Barwa ba ba lesome le bobedi ba ga Jakobe — modi wa ditso tse di lesome le bobedi

egypt.name: Egepeto (Goshene)
egypt.note: Lelapa le nna setšhaba se segolo — mme morago setšhaba sa makgoba.
events: Josefa, yo o rekisitsweng, o tlhatlogela mo taolong ya Egepeto
Lelapa lotlhe la ga Jakobe le fologela kwa tlase go tshaba leuba
Setšhaba sa Iseraele se se golang se a tshwarwa go nna makgoba

sinai.name: Thaba ya Sinai
sinai.note: Pholoso e kgolo go gaisa ya Testamente e Kgologolo — makgoba a nna morafe wa Modimo ka boene.
events: Dipetso tse di lesome le kwana ya Tlolaganyo
Lewatle le Lehibidu le a kgaogana mme ba a kgabaganya
Melao e e Lesome, Molao, motlaagana le ditlhabelo

kadesh.name: Kadese (sekaka)
kadesh.note: Go tlhoka tumelo go felela tshika lefatshe — le fa go ntse jalo Modimo o nna nabo.
events: Ditlhodi di le lesome le bobedi — mme batho ba gana go ikanya
Dingwaga di le 38 mo sekakeng — mana, leru le molelo
Mo mabaleng a Moabe, thero ya bofelo ya ga Moše (Doiteronomio)

jericho.name: Jeriko
jericho.note: Kwa bofelong ba tsena ba bo ba tsaya lefatshe le le solofeditsweng.
events: Noka ya Jorodane e a kgaogana mme batho ba a kgabaganya
Marako a Jeriko a a wa
Phenyo ya Kanana le kabo ya lefatshe

shiloh.name: Shilo (Baatlhodi)
shiloh.note: Go se na kgosi, mongwe le mongwe o dira jaaka a rata — kgosi ya nnete e a tlhokega.
events: Motlaagana o tlhomiwa kwa Shilo
Sediko sa boleo–kgatelelo–pholoso (Debora, Gideone, Samesone)
Ruthe — boikanyego mo malatsing a lefifi, mo losikeng lwa ga Dafita

jerusalem.name: Jerusalema · Bogosi jo bo Kopaneng
jerusalem.note: Setlhoa sa Iseraele — le tsholofetso ya kgosi e e sa khutleng.
events: Saulo kgosi ya ntlha, go bo go latela Dafita le Goliathe
Kgolagano le Dafita — “sedulo sa gago sa bogosi se tla nna ka bosakhutleng” (2 Samuele 7)
Solomone o aga Tempele kwa Jerusalema

samaria.name: Samaria · Bogosi jo bo Kgaoganeng
samaria.note: Bogosi jwa kgaogana mme jwa wela tlase fa baporofeti ba lela.
events: Morago ga Solomone, kgaogano go nna Juta le Iseraele
Borapela-medingwana jo bo boeletsang
Elia, Isaia, Jeremia ba lela ‘boang’ — ba bo ba bolela ka Mesia

nineveh.name: Ninefe (Asiria)
nineveh.note: Ka go itlhokomolosa ditlhagiso tsotlhe, bokone bo wela pele.
events: Ninefe, motsemogolo wa Asiria
Bogosi jwa bokone bo wela Asiria (722 PB)
Jona o romelwa kwa Ninefe

babylon.name: Babele
babylon.note: Bosigo jo bo lefifi go gaisa — le fa go ntse jalo tsholofetso ya tsosoloso e a sala.
events: Jerusalema e a wa, Tempele e a fisiwa (586 PB)
Juta o isiwa kwa Babele
Daniele le Esekiele — tumelo le diponatshegelo mo botshwarwa

susa.name: Susa (Peresia)
susa.note: Le mo pelong ya mmuso wa baheitane, Modimo o boloka batho ba gagwe.
events: Peresia o wisa Babele
Esetere o golola Bajuta mo phedisong
Nehemia o rapela fa pele ga kgosi mme a romelwa

return.name: Poelo kwa Jerusalema
return.note: Ba a boa ba bo ba aga gape — mme ga go na kgosi e e tsileng. Ba letela Mesia.
events: Makgaolakgang a mararo a poelo ka taolo ya ga Kuruse (Serubabele 538 · Esera 458 · Nehemia 444)
Tempele e agiwa gape le marako a Jerusalema a busolosiwa
Malaki — Testamente e Kgologolo e a konela: “ke tla roma morongwi wa me”

bethlehem.name: Bethelehema
bethlehem.note: Mesia yo o solofeditsweng o tla kwa motseng wa ga Dafita — Lefoko le le fetogileng nama.
events: O tsholwa kwa Bethelehema, motse wa ga Dafita
Baengele ba itsise badisa molaetsa
Banna ba botlhale ba tla go obamela

nazareth.name: Nasaretha
nazareth.note: Modimo o gola jaaka motho mo motseng o o tlwaelegileng.
events: O godisitswe mo ntlong ya mmetli wa logong
A le dingwaga di le lesome le bobedi, a botsa a bo a araba mo Tempeleng
Moragonyana o ganwa mo sinagogeng ya gabo

jordan.name: Noka ya Jorodane
jordan.note: Tirelo ya gagwe ya phatlalatsa e a simologa — legodimo le mo tshwaya jaaka Morwa.
events: O kolobediwa ke Johane
Mowa o fologa jaaka leeba — “Yo ke Morwaake yo o rategang”
O fenya diraelo tse tharo tsa ga Satane mo sekakeng

cana.name: Kana
cana.note: Mo sesupong sa gagwe sa ntlha o senola kgalalelo ya gagwe.
events: Moeng kwa lenyalong
Metsi a fetolwa beine — sesupo sa gagwe sa ntlha
Barutwa ba gagwe ba dumela mo go ene

sychar.name: Sukare (Samaria)
sychar.note: Tsela ya tirelo ya ntlha — go ralala Jerusalema go ya Samaria yo o nyadiwang.
events: O phepafatsa Tempele kwa Jerusalema
Bosigo, Nikodemo — “o tshwanetse go tsholwa sešwa”
Metsi a a tshelang go mosadi wa Mosamaria

capernaum.name: Kaperenauma
capernaum.today: lotshitshi lwa letsha la Galilea gompieno
capernaum.note: Lefelo la motheo la tirelo ya Galilea — pitso, go ruta le kganetso tsotlhe di kopanela fano.
events: O bitsa batshwari ba ditlhapi mme a ithaya fano
Thero ya kwa Thabeng — “Go sego ba ba humanegileng mo moweng”
Ditshwantsho tsa bogosi — le kganetso e e golang

galilee.name: Letsha la Galilea
galilee.note: Ka nonofo mo godimo ga tlholego o supa gore ke mang.
events: “Didimala, ritibala” — o ritibatsa setsuatsue
O fepa ba le 5,000 ka dinkgwe di le tlhano le ditlhapi di le pedi
O tsamaya mo godimo ga metsi

caesarea_p.name: Kaisarea Filipi
caesarea_p.note: Barutwa ba lemoga gore ke Keresete, mme tsela ya sefapaano e a bulega.
events: Boipolelo jwa ga Petoro — “O Keresete, Morwa Modimo o o tshelang”
O bolela ka loso le tsogo ya gagwe lwa ntlha
O fetoga ponalo mo kgalalelong kwa thabeng

jericho.name: Jeriko
jericho.note: Mo tseleng e e tlhatlogelang Jerusalema, o batla ba ba latlhegileng.
events: O foufolola Baratimeo yo o foufetseng
O bitsa Sakeo mokgethisi
“Morwa Motho o tletse go batla le go boloka se se latlhegileng”

bethany.name: Bethania
bethany.note: O supa taolo mo godimo ga loso pele ga beke ya gagwe ya bofelo.
events: O tsosa Lasaro mo lebitleng — “Ke nna tsogo le botshelo”
Maria o mo tlotsa kgakologelo ya phitlho
Sesupo se se thatafatsa maano a go mo bolaya

jerusalem.name: Jerusalema
jerusalem.note: Setlhoa se Baebele yotlhe e se supang — sefapaano, tsogo, go tlhatlogela legodimong.
events: Go tsena ka phenyo; o pitikolola ditafole tsa Tempele gape
Mo Selalelong se se Bofelo o tlhapisa barutwa dinao
O swa mo sefapaanong
O tsoga ka letsatsi la boraro, go bo go latela go tlhatlogela legodimong

antioch.name: Antiokia
antioch.note: Phuthego e e romang kwa tirelo ya Baditšhaba e simologang mme e boela teng.
events: Mo thapelong Mowa o tlhaola Baranabase le Saulo
Phuthego e badumedi ba neng ba bidiwa ‘Bakeresete’ teng lwa ntlha
Lefelo la go simolola maeto a 1, a 2 le a 3

seleucia.name: Seleukia
seleucia.note: Boemakepe jwa Antiokia — ba tsamaela kwa Kupero.

salamis.name: Salamise (Kupero)
salamis.note: Boemo jwa ntlha kwa Kupero — go rera mo disinagogeng.

paphos.name: Pafose
paphos.note: Nonofo e supiwa kgatlhanong le ba ba ganetsang Efangele.
events: Elima moloi o itewa ka bofofu
Sergio Paulo molaodi o a dumela
Go tswa fano ‘Paulo’ o tsaya pele

perga.name: Perega
perga.note: Boemakepe kwa Pamfilia — fano Johane Mareko o a boela morago.

pantioch.name: Antiokia ya Pisidia
pantioch.note: Efangele e a phatloga go ya kwa Baditšhabeng.
events: Thero e telele ya histori ya kgololo mo sinagogeng
Baditšhaba ba bantsi ba a itumela mme ba amogela lefoko
O lelekwa ke kganetso

iconium.name: Ikonio
iconium.note: Ba bantsi ba a dumela, mme pogiso e ba pateletsa go tswela pele.

lystra.name: Lisetera
lystra.note: O bidiwa modimo, go bo go latela go kgobotlediwa ka maje.
events: O fodisa monna yo o neng a tlhotsa go tswa botsalong
Boidiidi bo leka go ba direla ditlhabelo jaaka medimo
O kgobotlediwa ka maje a bo a tlogelwa a kete o sule, mme o a tsoga

derbe.name: Derebe
derbe.note: Barutwa ba bantsi ba a dirwa; ba boela morago go nonotsha diphuthego.

troas.name: Teroase
troas.note: Lefelo la phetogo kwa Efangele e lebang Yuropa lwa ntlha.
events: Ponatshegelo ya monna wa Makedonia
“Tlaya kwano o re thuse”
Ka bonako ba kgabaganyetsa kwa Yuropa

philippi.name: Filipi
philippi.note: Phuthego ya ntlha ya Yuropa — Efangele e fenya le mo kgolegelong.
events: Lidia, morekisi wa masela a bohibidu, o a dumela
Lelata la mosetsana yo o nang le mowa wa go laola o a gololwa
Difela tsa bosigogare, thoromo ya lefatshe, lelapa la molebeledi wa kgolegelo le a bolokwa

thess.name: Thesalonika
thess.note: Lefoko le tshikinya motse mme kganetso e a tuka.
events: O buisana le bone mo sinagogeng ka Disabata di le tharo
“Ba ba pitikolotseng lefatshe”
Ba a itlhokomolosa bosigo

berea.name: Berea
berea.note: Ba ba ‘tlotlegang’ ba ba neng ba sekaseka lefoko ka bobone.
events: Ba amogela lefoko ka tlhwaafalo
Letsatsi le letsatsi ba sekaseka Dikwalo go le tlhomamisa
Ba bantsi ba a dumela

athens.name: Athene
athens.note: Mo motseng wa borafilosofi o bolela ka ‘modimo o o sa itsiweng’.
events: O tlhotlhelediwa ke motse o o tletseng medingwana
Mo Areopago o rera Mmopi le tsogo
O sotlwa, mme ba sekae ba a dumela

corinth.name: Korinthe
corinth.note: O nna ngwaga le sephatlo, a tlhoma phuthego mo motseng wa boitshwaro jo bo bosula.
events: O dira megope le Akwila le Perisila
“O se ka wa boifa… gonne ke na le wena”
Bantsi ba Korinthe ba a dumela mme ba a kolobediwa

ephesus.name: Efeso
ephesus.note: Pelo ya loeto lwa boraro — lefoko le anama go ralala Asia.
events: Go ruta letsatsi le letsatsi ka dingwaga di le pedi mo holong ya ga Turano
Dibuka tsa boloi di a fisiwa; ditiro tsa nonofo
Demeterio mothudi wa selefera o tsosa khuduego

miletus.name: Mileto
miletus.note: Tsalano e e nang le dikeledi le bagolwane ba Efeso.
events: “Disang phuthego e o e rekileng ka madi a gagwe”
Bagolwane ba a lela, ba itse gore ga ba na go mo bona gape

caesarea.name: Kaisarea
caesarea.note: Ka dingwaga di le pedi o emelela Efangele fa pele ga balaodi le kgosi.
events: Ditsheko fa pele ga balaodi Felikse le Festo
Iphemelo ya gagwe fa pele ga Kgosi Ageripa
“Ke ikuela go Kaisara” — go ya Roma

jerusalem.name: Jerusalema
jerusalem.note: O tshwarwa mo Tempeleng, tsela ya gagwe jaaka legolegwa e a simologa.
events: O tshwarwa ke boidiidi mo Tempeleng
O iphemela fa pele ga lekgotla
Jaaka moagi wa Roma, o romelwa ka batlhokomedi go ya Kaisarea

myra.name: Mira
myra.note: Ba fetela mo sekepeng sa Alekesanderia se se yang Roma.

fairhaven.name: Makgora a Mantle (Kereta)
fairhaven.note: Tlhagiso ya ga Paulo ya go emisa go tsamaya ga e a reediwa.

crete.name: Kereta
crete.note: Morago ga go gololwa, setlhaketlhake se a tlogelang Tito teng go baakanya diphuthego.
events: O tlogela Tito go tlhoma bagolwane mo motseng mongwe le mongwe
O batla baeteledipele ba ba se nang molato, ba ba ikanyegang
O kwala lokwalo go Tito

malta.name: Maleta
malta.note: Ka setsuatsue le go robega ga sekepe, tsholofetso ya Modimo e a ema.
events: ‘Phefo ya bokonebotlhaba’ e robaganya sekepe, mme botlhe ba le 276 ba a phologa
O lomiwa ke noga, mme ga a utlwe botlhoko
O fodisa balwetse ba setlhaketlhake

syracuse.name: Sirakuse
syracuse.note: Ba nna malatsi a mararo kwa Sisili.

puteoli.name: Puteoli
puteoli.note: Ba fitlha kwa Italia mme ba kgatlhantshiwa ke badumedi ka bone.

rome.name: Roma
rome.note: Efangele e fitlha kwa pelong ya mmuso kwa bofelong — e seng bokhutlo mme tshimologo.
events: Dingwaga di le pedi mo go disiwa mo ntlong, a rera bogosi ka bopelokgale
Go tswa fano o kwala Dikwalo tsa Kgolegelo (Baefese·Bafilipi·Bakolosa·Filemone)
Moragonyana o tshwarwa gape, o kwala 2 Timotheo mme a bolawa — “Ke lolile ntwa e e molemo, ke weditse tsela ya go siana”

journeys.rome: Loeto lwa bone · go ya Roma
journeys.j5: Loeto lwa botlhano · morago ga go gololwa
